race.comment: MAYLEIGH (9) made a good impression on debut beaten 2.3L over 1000m at Warwick Farm. Began awkwardly and was five wide on the turn. She's been given a brief freshen and will be hard to beat in country grade over the longer sprint. NAFANUA (5) is a threat. She led and just missed at Nowra on debut and resumed with a 2.5L defeat over 1100m at Wyong. She can improve quickly and will be right in it. MISS MACLAINE (10) resumes and has shown enough at the provincials to take seriously. Maps well and just missed in a recent Kembla Grange trial. Can feature with the natural improvement. LADY CAPITALIST (8) debuts and is sure to be fancied. Won the first of her two trials and expect her to position forward and give a big sight.
